mapper.select: SELECT id AS requestId, from_user_id AS fromUserId, to_user_id AS toUserId, apply_msg AS applyMsg, status AS status, CASE WHEN to_user_id = #{userId} THEN 'INBOUND' ELSE 'OUTBOUND' END AS direction, created_at AS createdAt FROM im_friend_request WHERE from_user_id = #{userId} OR to_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
